page_metadata.bioconda__summary: DNA multiple sequence aligner from Penn State's Miller lab.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: DNA multiple sequence aligner from Penn State's Miller lab.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Computer program which builds a threaded blockset under the assumption that all matching segments occur in the same order and orientation in the given sequences; inversions and duplications are not addressed.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Computer program which builds a threaded blockset under the assumption that all matching segments occur in the same order and orientation in the given sequences; inversions and duplications are not addressed.
